fields.label: Kit Content Framework
fields.description: Loads the node structure into the table below.

fields.label: Default Item Group For New Items
fields.description: Used to auto-create the Item record for any row whose Treatment is "Subassembly New".

fields.label: Default Stock UOM For New Items
FG Item
fields.description: Tags this mapping to a Finished Good item.

fields.label: FG BOM
fields.description: Generated automatically by "Generate BOMs" — the top-level (L1) BOM for the FG Item, built from this mapping's level-1 rows (with Passthrough rows promoted to their nearest real descendants). This is the one marked as the Item's default BOM; the alternate levels below it (L2, L3, ... Fully Exploded) are reference BOMs only and are never marked default.

fields.label: Generated Alternate-Level BOMs
fields.description: L2 through Fully Exploded, generated alongside the FG BOM (L1) above by "Generate BOMs". Reference/alternate BOMs only — none of these are marked as the Item's default.
